plugins.name: claude-code-setup
plugins.description: Analyze codebases and recommend tailored Claude Code automations such as hooks, skills, MCP servers, and subagents.

plugins.name: claude-md-management
plugins.description: Tools to maintain and improve CLAUDE.md files - audit quality, capture session learnings, and keep project memory current.

plugins.name: code-review
plugins.description: Automated code review for pull requests using multiple specialized agents with confidence-based scoring.

plugins.name: code-simplifier
plugins.description: Agent that simplifies and refines code for clarity, consistency, and maintainability while preserving functionality.

plugins.name: coderabbit
plugins.description: AI-powered code review in Claude Code, powered by CodeRabbit.

plugins.name: context7
plugins.description: Upstash Context7 MCP server for up-to-date documentation lookup. Pull version-specific documentation and code examples directly from source repositories into your LLM context.

plugins.name: frontend-design
plugins.description: Frontend design skill for UI/UX implementation.

plugins.name: gopls-lsp
plugins.description: Go language server protocol integration for enhanced Go development support.

plugins.name: security-guidance
plugins.description: Security reminder hook that warns about potential security issues when editing files, including command injection, XSS, and unsafe code patterns.

plugins.name: skill-creator
plugins.description: Create new skills, improve existing skills, and measure skill performance. Use when users want to create a skill from scratch, update or optimize an existing skill, run evals to test a skill, or benchmark skill performance with variance analysis.

plugins.name: superpowers
plugins.description: Core skills library for Claude Code: TDD, debugging, collaboration patterns, and proven techniques.

skills.name: browser-use
skills.description: Automates browser interactions for web testing, form filling, screenshots, and data extraction.

skills.name: api-designer
skills.description: Use when designing REST or GraphQL APIs, creating OpenAPI specifications, or planning API architecture.

skills.name: architecture-designer
skills.description: Use when designing new high-level system architecture, reviewing existing designs, or making architectural decisions.

skills.name: cli-developer
skills.description: Use when building CLI tools, implementing argument parsing, or adding interactive prompts.

skills.name: database-optimizer
skills.description: Optimizes database queries and improves performance across PostgreSQL and MySQL systems.

skills.name: fullstack-guardian
skills.description: Builds security-focused full-stack web applications by implementing integrated frontend and backend components with layered security at every level.

skills.name: golang-pro
skills.description: Implements concurrent Go patterns using goroutines and channels, designs and builds microservices with gRPC or REST, and enforces idiomatic Go.

skills.name: javascript-pro
skills.description: Writes, debugs, and refactors JavaScript code using modern ES2023+ features, async/await patterns, ESM module systems, and Node.js APIs.

skills.name: laravel-specialist
skills.description: Build and configure Laravel 10+ applications, including Eloquent models, Sanctum authentication, Horizon queues, and Livewire components.

skills.name: nestjs-expert
skills.description: Creates and configures NestJS modules, controllers, services, DTOs, guards, and interceptors for enterprise-grade TypeScript backend applications.

skills.name: nextjs-developer
skills.description: Use when building Next.js 14+ applications with App Router, server components, or server actions.

skills.name: php-pro
skills.description: Use when building PHP applications with modern PHP 8.3+ features, Laravel, or Symfony frameworks.

skills.name: postgres-pro
skills.description: Use when optimizing PostgreSQL queries, configuring replication, or implementing advanced database features.

skills.name: prompt-engineer
skills.description: Writes, refactors, and evaluates prompts for LLMs - generating optimized prompt templates, structured output schemas, and evaluation rubrics.

skills.name: react-expert
skills.description: Use when building React 18+ applications, creating components, implementing custom hooks, or debugging rendering issues.

skills.name: sql-pro
skills.description: Optimizes SQL queries, designs database schemas, and troubleshoots performance issues across PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQL Server, and Oracle.

skills.name: vue-expert
skills.description: Builds Vue 3 components with Composition API, configures Nuxt 3, sets up Pinia stores, and scaffolds Quasar/Capacitor mobile apps.

skills.name: websocket-engineer
skills.description: Use when building real-time communication systems with WebSockets or Socket.IO.

skills.name: database-schema-designer
skills.description: Design robust, scalable database schemas for SQL and NoSQL databases with normalization guidelines, indexing strategies, and migration patterns.

skills.name: find-skills
skills.description: Helps users discover and install agent skills when they ask questions about extending capabilities.
